blended.narrative: Mt. Seymour is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 53 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 22" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
